title: Bhimaa
subTitle: After some mysterious instances at a temple of historical significance, a detective visits the region to investigate and find out the truth behind the incidents.

title: Police Power
subTitle: A police officer tries to change his younger brother, who turns to a life of crime, but he fails. He then takes on the local gangster responsible for inciting youngsters towards crime.

title: Kakuda
subTitle: Sunny is a resident of Rathodi, a village haunted by a resentful spirit. When a small mistake causes Sunny to be cursed, he approaches a ghost hunter to find a solution.

title: Angry Ganesha
subTitle: Before getting married to his lady-love, a man visits a temple where he inadvertently insults Lord Ganesha whose mount takes offence and sends a mouse to wreck his life.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: The Kerala Story
subTitle: Shalini, a former nursing student from Kerala, who later becomes the wife of a terrorist, testifies her life story and her journey from being a naive girl to another victim of terrorism.

title: Vanvaas
subTitle: After being abandoned by his sons, an elderly father grappling with dementia embarks on a life-changing journey. He is aided by a cunning thief who is determined to reunite him with his family.

title: Holiday: A Soldier Is Never off Duty
subTitle: An army intelligence officer arrives in Mumbai to spend the holiday with his family. However, he must switch back to work mode after a bomb rips through the heart of the city.

title: Dabangg
subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
subTitle: Zee Cine Awards 2026

title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
subTitle: Ramkishan and Mamta lead a happy life with their three sons. But when their daughter faces a tragedy, Mamta gets instigated by her close friends, and she embitters her heart towards her stepson Vivek.

title: Dabangg 2
subTitle: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.

title: Dabangg 2
subTitle: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.

title: Alludu Adhurs
subTitle: A young man named Sreenu swears off women following a failed relationship. However, he falls in love with a gangster's daughter and is even forced to compete with another man for her hand in marriage.

title: Saaho
subTitle: An undercover agent and his partner go after a thief who has stolen 2,000 crore rupees. Soon, they realise that the case is linked to the death of a crime lord and an emerging gang war.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Point Blank
subTitle: A police officer is assigned the case of a mysterious and sadistic serial killer. While he tracks down the suspects, the CCTV footage puts him next to the victim.

title: Karthikeya 2
subTitle: The movie deals with the personal problems of Karthik and how he comes out of them. His pursuit of the truth leads him to find out the power of Indian ancient system and Tatva of Lord Sri Krishna.

title: Jai Ho
subTitle: A former Indian military officer devises a unique plan to promote social responsibility amongst apathetic civilians. The masses embrace his initiative, but he must confront a potent political family.

title: Ramaiya Vastavaiya
subTitle: A man is challenged to work in a field and produce a huge harvest by the end of the season in order to marry the love of his life.

title: Krrish
subTitle: After discovering his father's truth, Krrish must reveals his superpowers to the world and becomes the masked superhero.

title: Skanda
subTitle: A skilled martial artist's life changes when a secret agency recruits him to stop terrorists. He faces a dangerous mission that will test his abilities and courage beyond anything he is known.

title: Satyameva Jayate
subTitle: DCP Shivansh is given a case to arrest the man responsible for the deaths of corrupt police officers. He begins his search without realising the killer is none other than Vir, his younger brother.

title: Satyameva Jayate
subTitle: DCP Shivansh is given a case to arrest the man responsible for the deaths of corrupt police officers. He begins his search without realising the killer is none other than Vir, his younger brother.

title: The Real Tiger
subTitle: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident is a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.

title: Ek Joshila
subTitle: Vamsi is hell-bent on seeking revenge and rescuing his lover Krishnaveni from the clutches of an evil landlord, Basavanna, who murdered his best friend.

title: Daring Baaz
subTitle: Goutham resolves to reunite his grandfather with Sunanda, his estranged aunt. However, he chooses to pose as a driver to befriend her.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Thank God
subTitle: An egotistical real estate broker comes face-to-face with God after meeting with an accident. Soon, he is forced to play a game that will put him either in heaven or hell.

title: Koogle Kuttappa
subTitle: A conservative villager hates the idea of his son relocating to Russia for a job. However, when his son brings a robot to care for him, he develops an unlikely bond with the machine.

title: Kisi Ka Bhai Kisi Ki Jaan
subTitle: Bhaijaan, the eldest of three siblings, refuses to get married to maintain harmony in his family. However, complications arise after his brothers conspire for him to fall in love.

title: Thalapathy is the G.O.A.T
subTitle: After retiring to pursue an ordinary life, a former elite agent reunites with his team when a past mission begins to threaten him and his family.
When mobiles start flying from people's hands, Dr Vaseegaran and his robot Nila are asked to help. However, due to Pakshi Rajan having a hand in this, the two have to reinstate Chitti to defeat him.

title: Gadar 2
subTitle: Upon learning about his father's disappearance at the border, Jeete believes that his father is captured and sets out to rescue him in Pakistan.

title: Tehran
subTitle: An officer tries to expose the truth about an explosive detonation within Delhi in 2012. However, his country abandons him during his quest and he falls in the crosshairs of Iran.
